<b>CMMI nedir?</b> Capability Maturity M: What is CMMI? Capability Maturity Model Integration — a global standard that evaluates how disciplined, measured and continuously improving processes are across 5 levels. Higher levels increase predictability, quality and efficiency. Organizational maturity = the average of process maturities.
<b>Denetim Günlüğü (Son 90 Gün)</b> — İş: Audit Log (Last 90 Days) — Action distribution + details of the last 20 entries
<b>Excel:</b> Data → From Web → URL'yi y: Excel: Data → From Web → paste the URL
<b>K-Vektör Skoru:</b> Her stratejiye ve: K-Vector Score: A comparison of the weight (%%) given to each strategy with that strategy's realized score. High weight + low score = the most critical focus point.
<b>KPI Özeti</b> — Aktif gösterge sayısı: KPI Summary — Number of active indicators, average success rate
<b>Kullanıcı Güvenliği</b> — 2FA etkinle: User Security — 2FA activation rate, administrator security status

<b>MVP Notu:</b> Bu MVP CSV/JSON endpoin: MVP Note: These are MVP CSV/JSON endpoints. Full OData v4 support (live refresh, filter, hierarchy navigation) requires additional development (60h estimate).
<b>MVP:</b> Bu sayfa mobile arayüz önizl: MVP: This page is a mobile interface preview. A full native app (React Native, iOS+Android) requires approximately 6-8 weeks of development.
<b>MVP:</b> Bu sayfa onay durumlarını gö: MVP: This page shows approval statuses. A full BPMN engine (visual flow design, multiple approvers, recall, escalation) requires approximately 150h of work.
<b>Muda nedir?</b> Japonca \"<i>israf</i: What is Muda? It means "waste" in Japanese. The 7 types of activities defined in the Toyota Production System that do not produce value for the customer. The fundamental principle in lean management: added value = total time − muda time. If you reduce muda, quality and speed increase at the same time.
<b>Nasıl okunur?</b> Her satır bir giriş: How to read? Each row is an initiative. The bar's length shows its duration, the fill percentage shows its completion rate. Overlapping time slots are a possible indicator of resource conflict.
<b>Nasıl okunur?</b> Her satır bir proje: How to read? Each row is a project. The "PI above target %%" column on the right summarizes how many of the PIs in all processes linked to that project are above target. You can expand the row to see the affected process and PI counts. Projects with "0 PI" are not linked to any process.
<b>Ne işe yarar?</b> Çeyrek bitiminde to: What is it for? For management meetings held at the end of the quarter: a 1-page summary for the executive, agenda items for the team to discuss, and questions each participant should prepare in advance. All derived with AI from the real data of the last 3 months.

<b>Not:</b> Sektörel paket, bir tenant i: Note: The sector package contains a ready set of 50-100 pages of strategy+process+PI for a tenant. A newly onboarded customer can start entering data in the first week. Full package apply feature coming soon. For now the package content can be previewed.
<b>OKR nedir?</b> <b>Objective</b> (Hede: What is OKR? Objective — is the answer to "What do we want to achieve?". Key Result — is the answer to "How will we measure what we achieved?". This page shows the link of OKRs to sub-strategies and the percentage progress of each KR.
<b>PG Bant Dağılımı:</b> Tüm performans: PI Band Distribution: Distribution of all performance indicators by target band — superior (≥%%110), normal (%%90–110), developing (%%70–90), critical (<%%70).
<b>Risk Özeti</b> — Açık risk sayısı, kr: Risk Summary — Number of open risks, critical RPN list
<b>Stratejik Girişim nedir?</b> Bir veya: What is a Strategic Initiative? It is a time- and resource-limited effort that advances one or more strategic sub-objectives. This report shows all initiatives in a single visual; it instantly answers which are progressing healthily, which are exceeding budget, which should take priority.
<b>Stratejik Plan Yapısı</b> — Strateji,: Strategic Plan Structure — Count of strategies, sub-strategies, processes and PIs
<b>Vizyon → Strateji → Alt Strateji → Sü: Vision → Strategy → Sub-Strategy → Process → PI flow visual. Band thickness = weight/contribution · Color = current score
<b>Önemli:</b> Gösterilen değerler sektö: Important: The displayed values are the sector's general average — not your organization's actual values for these metrics. To make a real comparison, metrics such as OEE, OTIF, NPS need to be added to the system as PIs and measured.
<b>İlk versiyon notu:</b> Bu sunum şu an: First version note: This presentation is currently in the format of 8 main slides + cover + closing. Visual charts are not yet included — only text + data tables. In the next version, matplotlib visuals and more AI narrative will be added.
<strong>2FA (İki Adımlı Doğrulama)</stro: 2FA (Two-Step Verification) significantly increases account security. Administrator accounts not having 2FA enabled is a critical security vulnerability in particular. This report shows TOTP (Google Authenticator / Authy) based verification.
<strong>IsolationForest nedir?</strong>: What is IsolationForest? It is a machine learning method that goes beyond statistical thresholds like Z-score. For each PI, all historical measurement values are processed by a model to flag measurements that deviate from normal.
<strong>Nasıl çalışır?</strong> Her PG i: How does it work? For each PI, the success scores of the most recent recorded periods are examined. Indicators staying below %%50 for 3 or more consecutive periods
<strong>RPN (Risk Öncelik Puanı)</strong: RPN (Risk Priority Number) = Probability (1–5) × Impact (1–5)  ·  Cell color:
